analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held rates at 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 — already priced in. No major economic data due in next 24h. ETF outflows are the primary near-term headwind. ISM Manufacturing PMI released earlier today (impact digested). Next major catalyst: NFP May 8.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): BTC showing slight recovery (+2.07%) with institutional support above $76K, but ETF outflows and weak altcoin breadth (74% down) prevent a bullish reading. Mixed signals warrant neutral stance. Bot filter INACTIVE — confidence 0.40 < 0.50 threshold.
